content_body: We decided to take our family on a vacation and we couldn't have picked a nicer vacation spot. The cabin was truly beautiful. We all enjoyed the amazing setting. We cooked out, played board games, walked by the stream, went to downtown Blue Ridge, bowled, hiked to the Summit of Springer Mountain, and rafted the Ocoee. Our family made wonderful memories this weekend.
title: WOW...Awesome...Amazing!!!
